headline: Yum! Brands Appoints Former Marriott International CFO Kathleen (Leeny) K. Oberg to Board
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., April 01, 2026--Yum! Brands, Inc. (NYSE: YUM) today announced the appointment of Kathleen (Leeny) K. Oberg, former Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President, Development of Marriott International, Inc., to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026.

headline: Domino's Pizza: One Of The Few Winners In A Tough Restaurant Market - And Now Undervalued
summary: Domino's Pizza projects over 800 net new stores and 6% global retail sales growth in 2026. Read why DPZ stock is a Buy.
